allow: PowerShell($n=\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($n\){"node: "+\(node --version\)}else{"node: missing"}; $p=\(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($p\){"python: "+\(python --version\)}else{"python: missing"}; $py=\(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($py\){"py: present"}else{"py: missing"}; $npx=\(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($npx\){"npx: present"}else{"npx: missing"})
